title: Thumb base pain
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports usage-related joint pain, stiffness, motion restriction, tenderness, swelling, instability, functional limitation, night pain, fever, redness or heat, weight loss, and systemic concern features.
red_flags.rationale: Supports entered osteoarthritis manifestations and red flags for thumb-base pain; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports usage-related joint pain, stiffness, motion restriction, tenderness, swelling, instability, functional limitation, night pain, fever, redness or heat, weight loss, and systemic concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28

investigations.text: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-led diagnostic and imaging context for thumb-base pain; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Side, joint, onset, trauma, stiffness, swelling, grip or pinch impact, examination, imaging and diagnosis are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for thumb-base pain.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
